channel.title: Posts on My Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on My Hugo Site

item.title: The nature of information problem
item.description: In this unit, I learned about transforming and optimizing images. At first, the topic felt a bit challenging because I had never considered images this way before. Previously, I only viewed images as pictures on my phone, laptop, or social media. I didn’t realize that images can also be described using math and data. This topic helped me see that images are not just pictures; they represent information that can be changed and improved.

item.title: The nature of information problem
item.description: In this unit, I learned about transforming and optimizing images. At first, the topic felt a bit challenging because I had never considered images this way before. Previously, I only viewed images as pictures on my phone, laptop, or social media. I didn’t realize that images can also be described using math and data. This topic helped me see that images are not just pictures; they represent information that can be changed and improved.

item.title: Class Reflection
item.description:
DIKW MODEL

In today’s class, I learned about DIKW, which means Data, Information, Knowledge, and Wisdom. Data is simple facts, and information helps us understand those facts. Knowledge teaches us how to use this information in real life. Wisdom helps us make good and correct decisions using what we learn.
